'''Shesharile 5''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Shesharile system/Legends|Shesharile system]], located in the [[Minos Cluster/Legends|Minos Cluster]]. Its government employed the [[Legally Authorized Law Authorities]], a
private [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|law enforcement agency]] headquartered in [[Gallisport]], the moon's crowded and run-down industrial [[capital]] [[City/Legends|city]]. [[Dutan Mining Supply Exports]] and the [[Minos-Mestra Corporation]] were also based there.<ref name="GG6">''[[Galaxy Guide 6: Tramp Freighters]]''</ref>

{{Moon-stub}}
